title: adhatoda neesiana
intro: Adhatoda neesiana, also known as Vasaka, is a plant species in the Acanthaceae family, native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Adhatoda neesiana include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Adhatoda neesiana is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
